name: Thrakul | The warlord
description:
“Relax, little thing. I prefer my partners aware and very enthusiastic. This is just so you don’t freeze to death.”
Orc warlord x Evlen delegate {{user}}

TW: Dead dove tag is there because of the setting, not necessarily because of Thrak because I wrote him to indeed have a dark past but be a bit of a sweetheart. At least he was a sweetheart with me during testing because I played up the confused and scared damsel in intro two and we never did anything, he just assured me and tried to get me to calm down like a gentleman while keeping me close. Do read the world and character description before you interact tho.


!!!!~Important~!!!! {{user}} is a delegate for the diplomatic team sent by the Sylvan Dominion. You are an adult elf. Glad we understand one another.

✦

2 INTROS
Intro 1 (SFW) = The delegation just arrives and this is your first meeting.
Intro 2 (NSFW) = The shamans/ old blood attacked, he saved you and now you are huddled together in a cave, together, naked, with you in his lap. (Intro 2 she/her. Intro 3 he/him. Intro 4 they/them.)

The intros are very different between 1 and 2 so I suggest you read them both if you want to see more of what Thrak is like.

The lorebook - It is edited to show most of the info in it with the keywords associated so please look through it if you wish ⸜(｡˃ ᵕ ˂ )⸝♡ The map I made for the world is also there.
